THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIPPERT, RONALD S. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3845 LAWTON STREET, LOWER LEVEL, S.F., STAYED UNTIL AUG-31-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED TILL SUNDAY, AUGUST 31, 1997 MIDNIGHT. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF RETAINS SECURITY DEPOSIT. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. PLTF MAY START CODE WORK ON 8/1/97 SO LONG AS DEFT'S QUIET ENJOYMENT IS NOT DISTURBED. PLTF WILL PROVIDE DEFT W/POSITIVE LETTER OF RECOMMENDATION.
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF SERTA, HENRY SERATA, ADELINA
